title: DescribeStorediSCSIVolumesInput
description: A JSON object containing a list of DescribeStorediSCSIVolumesInput$VolumeARNs.

allOf.description: An array of strings where each string represents the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a stored volume. All of the specified stored volumes must be from the same gateway. Use ListVolumes to get volume ARNs for a gateway.
